name: 1.2bu/45L Flexible Oval Laundry Basket White - Brightroom™: Portable Clothes Storage with Built-In Handles
description:
Transform your laundry chores with this 1.2-Bushel Flexible Oval Laundry Basket from Brightroom™. Featuring an oval silhouette with an open top, this white flexible laundry basket showcases a diamond mesh design for ventilation and two built-in handles for easy lifting and carrying from room to room. Whether it's clothes, towels or linens, the plastic laundry basket is the perfect companion to meet your household laundry or storage needs.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
